abstracts.abstract: This Act removes the up to 10% increase in school property taxes allowed after reassessment  This Act takes effect July 1, 2025, and applies to all public school tax rates after July 1, 2025.

bill.title: AN ACT TO AMEND TITLE 14 OF THE DELAWARE CODE RELATING TO LIMITATION ON PUBLIC SCHOOLS' TAX RATE AFTER GENERAL REASSESSMENT.
